title: Arthroscopic Surgery for Degenerative Knee Arthritis and Meniscal Tears - BMJ Rapid Recommendation Infographic

L2: BMJ Rapid Recommendation infographic for arthroscopic surgery in degenerative knee disease
Visual summary of evidence for/against arthroscopic knee surgery
L3: Complete BMJ Rapid Recommendation infographic for arthroscopic surgery for degenerative knee arthritis and meniscal tears. Reproduced with permission from BMJ. Used in user testing study in primary care to evaluate clinician comprehension and usability.
